title: Cochin Shipyard Rigger Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
short_info: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) has announced the latest Rigger Recruitment 2026! Published on 06 May 2026 at the official website https://www.cochinshipyard.in, this recruitment drive offers 40 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 23 years and possessing a minimum educational qualification of VIII Standard pass can apply online from 06 May 2026 to 30 May 2026. Complete details about the Cochin Shipyard Rigger 2026 vacancy, including eligibility criteria, selection process, online application form, and official notification PDF, are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in VIII Std. (Graduates/Diploma holders not eligible)

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on eligibility requirements and certificate verification
Physical Test For 100 marks. Minimum pass: UR/EWS – 50, OBC – 45, SC – 40
Rank List Prepared based on Physical Test marks; tie broken by age
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Cochin Shipyard to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Cochin Shipyard Rigger recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Cochin Shipyard Rigger recruitment is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Rigger post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Rigger post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 23 years as of the specified date.

faq.question: Q3. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there are no application fees for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Rigger post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Rigger post is passing the VIII Standard.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Rigger post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies available for the Rigger post in Cochin Shipyard.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Rigger position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 11000 per month for the first year and Rs. 12000 per month for the second year of the contract.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Rigger recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on the online application, followed by certificate verification, a physical test, and potentially a screening written test.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract job as per the information provided.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Cochin Shipyard located?
faq.answer: Cochin Shipyard is located in Kochi, Kerala.
